agent.status: Big simplification of how games come together: instead of a whole neighborhood voting between competing spots, each game someone proposes is now its own thing — neighbors just get an email with the details and tap Interested or Not. Reworked the whole flow end to end; tests all green.
agent.direction: Get this reviewed and merged to dev. Still need to soften the landing-page promise to match the new 'propose a game' model.
